rulings.Case Title: BETTY WILLIAMS, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR et al VS. DOES 1 THROUGH 75, INCLUSIVE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs Of Defendant B.E. Development Corporation
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 15, 2016 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion to tax costs of defendant B.E. Development Corp. is continued on the court's own motion to April 13, 2016. Plaintiffs failed to deliver courtesy copies of their moving papers and reply to Department 503 and must do so no later than 4:00p.m. on March 15, 2016, as required by Local Rule 2.7(B). =(503/GLW)
